title: Ethereal Optimized
description:
🪄神奇的整合包将游戏体验与性能融为一体,这不神奇吗.
🪄Self-proclaimed Pioneer in Game Optimization Exploration
body:
**Ethereal Optimized** is a Minecraft modpack that seeks to deliver higher performance under the premise of non-absolute stability. 

**Ethereal Optimized**是一个试图在不稳定的前提下提供更高性能表现的Minecraft整合包。

## 🔧Development Philosophy
The objective of this modpack is to identify the best optimization methods that offer maximum performance while maintaining sufficient stability through extensive testing. As a result, this modpack will never reach a formal release version. 

## 🔧开发方针
该整合包的目的是通过大量测试,以期望找到最好的能提供最大性能且足够稳定的优化方法，因此本整合包永远不会发布正式版。

## 🪛Open Development
Ethereal Optimized is open-source, as are most of its mods. We strongly encourage everyone to actively provide feedback so that we can progress together on this path of exploration.

## 🪛透明开发
Ethereal Optimized是开源的，也尽可能选择使用开源模组。我们也强烈希望各位能积极提供反馈，在这条探索的道路上共同前行。

## ⏱️Timely Updates
Ethereal Optimized maintains rapid updates in line with our development philosophy.

## ⏱️及时更新
Ethereal Optimized保持快速更新，以遵循我们的开发方针。

## 🧩Less QOL Mods
We aim to provide only the essential quality-of-life (QOL) mods to ensure that Ethereal Optimized remains sufficiently user-friendly.

## 🧩较少的QOL模组
我们尽可能只提供必需的QOL模组，以保持Ethereal Optimized具有足够的易用性。

## ⚙️Built on Fabric
We use the lightweight and swiftly updated Fabric mod loader. You can use this modpack as a base to add your favorite mods and redistribute it (subject to compliance with the license).

## ⚙️基于 Fabric
我们使用轻量且更新迅速的的Fabric模组加载器。您可以使用该整合包作为基础，添加您喜欢的模组并再分发（要求遵循协议）。
